files.patch:
@@ -18,8 +18,8 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: 20
-          cache: pnpm
       - run: corepack enable
+      - run: corepack prepare pnpm@10.22.0 --activate
       - run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
       - run: pnpm --version
       - run: pnpm check
